SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureInput

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PipeFireRuptureInput extends Object implements Serializable
Input data for one blowdown pipe fire-rupture strain-rate calculation.

Geometry is stored as pipe outside diameter and nominal wall thickness with explicit corrosion allowance and wall-thickness undertolerance. The effective wall is calculated as nominalWall * (1 - undertolerance) - corrosionAllowance, matching the benchmark workbook.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:
